config/public.js::console-web-surface-co.value:
config.surfaceDefinitions.console = {
  id: "console",
  label: "Console",
  pagesRoot: "console",
  enabled: true,
  requiresAuth: true,
  requiresWorkspace: false,
  accessPolicyId: "console_owner",
  icon: "mdi-console-network-outline",
  showInSurfaceSwitchMenu: false,
  origin: ""
};

config/surfaceAccessPolicies.js::console.reason: Register console-owner surface access policy for the console surface.
